Synthesizing 'nco' ...
-- Implementing module 'nco'

Finished scheduling.

Binding ...
Finished micro-architecture generation.
Finished Binding: CPU user time: 0.01 seconds. CPU system time: 0 seconds. Elapsed time: 0.01 seconds; current allocated memory: 1.119 GB.
-- Generating RTL for module 'nco'
Design contains AXI ports. Reset is fixed to synchronous and active low.
Setting interface mode on port 'nco/sine_sample' to 's_axilite & ap_vld'.
Setting interface mode on port 'nco/step_size' to 's_axilite & ap_none'.
Setting interface mode on function 'nco' to 's_axilite & ap_ctrl_hs'.
Register 'temp_V' is power-on initialization.
Bundling port 'return' to AXI-Lite port CTRL.
Bundling port 'sine_sample' and 'step_size' to AXI-Lite port DATA.
Finished creating RTL model for 'nco'.
Implementing memory 'nco_sine_lut_V_ROM_AUTO_1R' using auto ROMs.

Generating VHDL RTL for nco.

**** Estimated Fmax: 157.95 MHz
